prestazioni: J37A4 (3.7L V6) engine: Full bolt-on package with a Comptech Supercharger kit (Eaton M90-based, 6-8 psi boost) paired with a Hondata K-Pro V4 standalone ECU reflash for optimized ignition timing and fuel maps, supporting 380-400 WHP on 93 octane with a 3.5-inch Comptech exhaust system (mandrel-bent, 304 stainless steel) and a custom 3-inch downpipe with a Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the UB2 chassis, 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs) paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 19mm rear) and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set, including subframe and differential mounts) for reduced deflection under hard cornering

Forced induction supporting mods: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (internally gated, .64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom Comptech intercooler (7.5x12x3.5 core, bar-and-plate design) and a TiAL MV-R 38mm wastegate, fed by a Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (1000cc/min), with a custom 3-inch silicone intake piping system from Vibrant Performance and a K&N cold air intake (part #69-9101TP)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (TSX-specific, bolt-on fenders with 20mm extended flares) paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter from Seibon (TSX UB2-specific, 3-piece design with adjustable canards) and a Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1700mm width, 3D carbon fiber construction, adjustable angle from 10-25 degrees)

Custom 3M Matte Graphite Grey vinyl wrap (Xpel Stealth series) with a full dechroming package (blacked-out emblems, grille, and window trim via Plasti-Dip) and a custom LED lighting setup: Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED headlights (drop-in, plug-and-play for TSX) with Morimoto XB35 LED fog lights and a custom rear LED taillight setup from V-LED (TSX-specific, sequential turn signals)

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (TSX-specific mounting brackets, FIA-approved) wrapped in Alcantara (custom red stitching) paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Mod.78 wheel (350mm, suede), with a full custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8-point, bolt-in, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) and a custom center console delete (replaced with a carbon fiber panel housing a Racepak IQ3 digital dash)
